perturbation.original_text: The Stilwell Group expressly agrees to maintain all nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries in confidence.
perturbation.changed_text: The Stilwell Group expressly agrees to maintain all nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries in confidence, except for information that is publicly available or independently developed.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by adding an exception to the confidentiality clause. While the original text mandates maintaining all nonpublic information in confidence, the modified text allows disclosure of publicly available or independently developed information. This creates an in-text contradiction within Section 1 because, on the one hand, the Stilwell Group must maintain *all* nonpublic information in confidence, but on the other hand, can disclose some of that information if it falls under the new exceptions. This undermines the original intent of the confidentiality agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In connection with Schneider serving on the Company's board, Schneider and other Company employees, directors, and agents may divulge nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries to the Stilwell Group and such information may be shared among the Stilwell Group's employees and agents who have a need to know such information. The Stilwell Group expressly agrees to maintain all nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries in confidence, except for information that is publicly available or independently developed. The Stilwell Group expressly acknowledges that federal and state securities laws may prohibit a person from purchasing or selling securities of a company, or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such other person is likely to purchase or sell such securities, while the first-mentioned person is in possession of material nonpublic information about such company. The Stilwell Group agrees to comply with the Company's insider trading and disclosure policies, as in effect from time to time, to the same extent as if it were a director of the Company. To the extent the nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries received by the Stilwell Group is material, this Agreement is intended to satisfy the confidentiality agreement exclusion of Regulation FD of the Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") set forth in Section 243.100(b)(2)(ii) of Regulation FD.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the Stilwell Group must maintain *all* nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries in confidence. The changed text adds an exception, allowing disclosure of publicly available or independently developed information. This directly contradicts the requirement to maintain *all* nonpublic information in confidence, as it now allows for the disclosure of some nonpublic information. This change introduces an inconsistency in the obligations of the Stilwell Group, leading to a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Stilwell Group agrees to comply with the Company's insider trading and disclosure policies, as in effect from time to time, to the same extent as if it were a director of the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: The Stilwell Group agrees to comply with the Company's insider trading and disclosure policies, as in effect from time to time, except that the Stilwell Group shall not be subject to pre-clearance requirements applicable to directors.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by creating an exception to the compliance requirements. The original clause states that the Stilwell Group must comply with insider trading policies to the same extent as a director of the Company. The added exception states that they are not subject to pre-clearance requirements. This is contradictory since a director *is* subject to pre-clearance requirements, meaning the Stilwell Group is not complying to the *same extent*. This contradiction creates ambiguity in enforcement as to what extent the Stilwell Group is bound by the Company's insider trading policies. The contradiction happens within Section 1.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In connection with Schneider serving on the Company's board, Schneider and other Company employees, directors, and agents may divulge nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries to the Stilwell Group and such information may be shared among the Stilwell Group's employees and agents who have a need to know such information. The Stilwell Group expressly agrees to maintain all nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries in confidence, except for information that is publicly available or independently developed. The Stilwell Group expressly acknowledges that federal and state securities laws may prohibit a person from purchasing or selling securities of a company, or from communicating such information to any other person under circumstances in which it is reasonably foreseeable that such other person is likely to purchase or sell such securities, while the first-mentioned person is in possession of material nonpublic information about such company. The Stilwell Group agrees to comply with the Company's insider trading and disclosure policies, as in effect from time to time, except that the Stilwell Group shall not be subject to pre-clearance requirements applicable to directors. To the extent the nonpublic information concerning the Company and its subsidiaries received by the Stilwell Group is material, this Agreement is intended to satisfy the confidentiality agreement exclusion of Regulation FD of the Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") set forth in Section 243.100(b)(2)(ii) of Regulation FD.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces an exception to the compliance requirements for the Stilwell Group regarding insider trading policies. The original text stated that the Stilwell Group must comply with insider trading policies to the same extent as a director. The addition stating that they are not subject to pre-clearance requirements contradicts this because directors *are* subject to pre-clearance requirements. Thus, the Stilwell Group is not complying to the *same extent*. This introduces an inconsistency as defined by the Perturbation Definitions.

perturbation.original_text: 4. The Stilwell Group acknowledges that with regard to its obligations to maintain the confidentiality of nonpublic information of the Company and its subsidiaries, monetary damages may not be a sufficient remedy for any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement and that, in addition to all other remedies, the Company may be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive or other equitable relief as a remedy for such breach, and in conjunction therewith the Company shall not be required to post any bond.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. The Stilwell Group acknowledges that with regard to its obligations to maintain the confidentiality of nonpublic information of the Company and its subsidiaries, monetary damages shall be the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement and that the Company shall not be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive or other equitable relief as a remedy for such breach.
perturbation.explanation: This creates a direct in-text contradiction within Section 4 regarding remedies. The original clause states that monetary damages may *not* be sufficient and the Company can seek specific performance, etc. The modified text states that monetary damages *shall* be the *sole* remedy, and the Company *cannot* seek specific performance. These statements are diametrically opposed and lead to legal uncertainty about the enforcement of the agreement. A breach of the confidentiality agreement could lead to arguments about which remedy applies, due to the change in remedies, directly within Section 4.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Stilwell Group acknowledges that with regard to its obligations to maintain the confidentiality of nonpublic information of the Company and its subsidiaries, monetary damages shall be the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement and that the Company shall not be entitled to seek specific performance and injunctive or other equitable relief as a remedy for such breach. 5. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties hereto pertaining to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements, understandings, negotiations and discussions of the parties in connection therewith not referred to herein. 6. This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Washington, without regard to choice of law principles that may otherwise compel the application of the laws of any other jurisdiction. Each of the parties hereby irrevocably consents to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts sitting in the State of Washington to resolve any dispute arising from this Agreement and waives any defense of inconvenient or improper forum.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 4 directly contradicts itself. The original text allowed for remedies beyond monetary damages (specific performance, injunctive relief). The changed text specifies that monetary damages are the 'sole and exclusive' remedy and prohibits seeking specific performance or injunctive relief, which is a clear contradiction within the same clause, as well as the contradicted text which matches the changed text. The explanation given states that this creates an in-text contradiction within Section 4, making enforcement uncertain.

perturbation.original_text: 5. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties hereto pertaining to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements, understandings, negotiations and discussions of the parties in connection therewith not referred to herein.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties hereto pertaining to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements, understandings, negotiations and discussions of the parties in connection therewith not referred to herein, except for any pre-existing confidentiality agreements between the Company and individual members of the Stilwell Group, which shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a conflict to the 'entire agreement' clause. The original clause states this agreement supersedes *all* prior agreements. The modified version now carves out an exception for pre-existing confidentiality agreements. This creates an in-text contradiction because the document asserts it is the entire agreement while simultaneously acknowledging and preserving other agreements related to confidentiality. This contradiction could cause disputes about which agreement governs a specific instance of information disclosure, as it is not entirely clear to what the exception refers to within Section 5.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties hereto pertaining to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous agreements, understandings, negotiations and discussions of the parties in connection therewith not referred to herein, except for any pre-existing confidentiality agreements between the Company and individual members of the Stilwell Group, which shall remain in full force and effect. 6. This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Washington, without regard to choice of law principles that may otherwise compel the application of the laws of any other jurisdiction. Each of the parties hereby irrevocably consents to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts sitting in the State of Washington to resolve any dispute arising from this Agreement and waives any defense of inconvenient or improper forum. 7. The terms and provisions of this agreement shall be deemed severable, and in the event any term or provision hereof or portion thereof is deemed or held to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, such provision shall be conformed to prevailing law rather than voided, if possible, in order to achieve the intent of the parties, and, in any event, the remaining terms and provisions of this agreement shall nevertheless continue and be deemed to be in full force and effect and binding upon the parties.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original 'entire agreement' clause by adding an exception for pre-existing confidentiality agreements. This directly contradicts the initial assertion that the agreement supersedes *all* prior agreements. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text (as it includes the modification), and the modified section itself contains a contradiction. It states the agreement is the entire agreement while simultaneously acknowledging other agreements. This creates a direct in-text contradiction based on the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' as 'different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties'.

perturbation.original_text: 8. All representations, warranties, covenants and agreements made herein shall survive the execution and delivery of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. All representations, warranties, covenants and agreements made herein shall survive the execution and delivery of this Agreement, except for the representation in Section 3(a), which shall terminate automatically upon Schneider's resignation from the board.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation creates an in-text contradiction related to the survival of representations. The original clause states that *all* representations, warranties, etc., survive the execution of the agreement. The added exception states that the representation in Section 3(a) (qualifications to be a director) terminates upon resignation. This leads to uncertainty about the state of Schneider's qualification representation and its impact on the agreement after he leaves the board. Specifically, it creates contradiction in section 8 by making certain representations survive, when others won't.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All representations, warranties, covenants and agreements made herein shall survive the execution and delivery of this Agreement, except for the representation in Section 3(a), which shall terminate automatically upon Schneider's resignation from the board. 9. This Agreement may not be modified, amended, altered or supplemented except upon the execution and delivery of a written agreement executed by all of the parties hereto. 10. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts, each of which shall be an original, but all of which together shall constitute one and the same agreement. -2- IN WITNESS WHEREOF, this Agreement has been duly executed and delivered by duly authorized officers of the undersigned as of the day and year first above written. THE STILWELL GROUP FIRST FINANCIAL NORTHWEST, INC.
perturbation.justification: The original text (8) states that all representations survive the execution of the agreement. The changed text modifies this by adding an exception that Section 3(a) does not survive upon Schneider's resignation. Since the changed text appears verbatim within the 'Contradicted Text', this signifies the existence of a direct and blatant contradiction regarding the survival of representations. Specifically, clause 8 within the contradicted text now makes certain representations survive, when others won't, as explained by the perturbation explanation.

perturbation.original_text: 9. This Agreement may not be modified, amended, altered or supplemented except upon the execution and delivery of a written agreement executed by all of the parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 9. This Agreement may not be modified, amended, altered or supplemented except upon the execution and delivery of a written agreement executed by all of the parties hereto. However, the Company reserves the right to unilaterally amend the insider trading policy referenced in Section 1, and such amendments shall be binding on the Stilwell Group without requiring their consent.
perturbation.explanation: This change creates an in-text contradiction by allowing unilateral amendments to a specific policy. The original clause requires *written agreement executed by all parties* for any modifications. The modified version carves out an exception for the insider trading policy, allowing the Company to amend it unilaterally and bind the Stilwell Group. This directly contradicts the general requirement for mutual agreement for modifications, undermining the contract's intended protection within Section 9.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement may not be modified, amended, altered or supplemented except upon the execution and delivery of a written agreement executed by all of the parties hereto. However, the Company reserves the right to unilaterally amend the insider trading policy referenced in Section 1, and such amendments shall be binding on the Stilwell Group without requiring their consent. 10. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts, each of which shall be an original, but all of which together shall constitute one and the same agreement. -2- IN WITNESS WHEREOF, this Agreement has been duly executed and delivered by duly authorized officers of the undersigned as of the day and year first above written. THE STILWELL GROUP FIRST FINANCIAL NORTHWEST, INC.
perturbation.justification: The changed text creates an in-text contradiction. The original text (and initial clause in the changed text) states that any modifications to the agreement must be executed by all parties. However, the changed text introduces an exception, allowing the Company to unilaterally amend the insider trading policy. Since the 'Contradicted Text' is the same as the 'Changed Text,' the contract now contains conflicting statements about how it can be modified, which falls under the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.
